hero.description:
Artificial intelligence is transforming music.
Those who master traditional harmony will have the advantage.
Immerse yourself in the tradition of Shostakovich and the Moscow Conservatory,
contrast your works with the Virtual Teacher and develop a truly professional ear.

features.description: A complete ecosystem: classical theory, ear training, and intelligent feedback.

course.title: Traditional Harmony Course
course.description: The Shostakovich-Medrano-Cárdenas method: harmony and analysis, harmonic vocal quartet. 60+ lessons, completely free.

apps.title: 10 Educational Apps
apps.description: Free app suite on the website and for Android: mental math, memory and total ear training.

virtualTeacher.title: Virtual Teacher
virtualTeacher.description: Write your assignment as a midi file in our sequencer and the Virtual Teacher will guide you toward perfection.

book.title: The Musical Beings
